title: Savory Mexican Orange Peel Stir-fry
description: A light and crispy mexican dish featuring candied orange peel with high-protein ingredients for a perfect high-protein-friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat your sous-vide machine to 140°F (60°C). Cook the ground turkey or chicken breast for about 30 minutes, until fully cooked.
In a small saucepan, mix soy sauce with lemon juice and set aside. Heat sesame oil in a wok over medium-high heat, add minced garlic and sauté for one minute.

Add sliced red bell pepper to the wok and stir-fry for about 2 minutes or until slightly softened. Add chopped green onions, orange peel pieces (skin only), soy sauce mixture, and ground turkey/chicken breast.
Stir everything together until orange peel is soft and chicken/turkey is fully cooked. Adjust seasoning if needed. Serve hot with cilantro as a garnish.

To prepare orange peel for sous-vide: soak in water for 30 minutes, then coat with sugar syrup (1 cup of water and 2 tablespoons of granulated sugar), place in sous-vide bag, cook at 150°F (65°C) for 2 hours. Rinse clean before using.
Serve this dish as a side or main course, depending on your preference.
